title: Salesforce vs Zoho CRM
description: Compare Salesforce vs Zoho CRM in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right crm & sales tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Salesforce emerges as our recommendation for most users based on overall performance, feature set, and value. However, Zoho CRM is an excellent choice if you prioritize specific features like crm & sales capabilities. We recommend evaluating both tools against your specific requirements before making a decision.

faqs.question: Which is better, Salesforce or Zoho CRM?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Salesforce edges ahead with a 4.4/5 rating compared to 4.2/5 for Zoho CRM. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. Salesforce excels at Enterprise CRM leader powering sales, service, and marketing on a unified AI-dri, while Zoho CRM is stronger for Comprehensive CRM platform with sales, marketing and service modules..

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Salesforce and Zoho CRM?
faqs.answer: Salesforce and Zoho CRM differ in several key areas: pricing ($25–$300+/mo per user vs $14-65/mo), target audience, and core feature focus. Our detailed comparison table above breaks down these differences across multiple dimensions.

faqs.question: Is Salesforce better than Zoho CRM for enterprises?
faqs.answer: For enterprise use, Salesforce generally offers more robust features, but the right choice depends on your specific enterprise requirements including security, compliance, and integration needs.

faqs.question: Is Salesforce cheaper than Zoho CRM?
faqs.answer: Salesforce starts at $25–$300+/mo per user while Zoho CRM starts at $14-65/mo. Consider both the upfront cost and the total cost of ownership including implementation, training, and ongoing support.

faqs.question: Which tool has better integrations, Salesforce or Zoho CRM?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer extensive integration ecosystems, though they focus on different categories. Salesforce integrates well with crm & sales tools, while Zoho CRM connects with crm & sales platforms.

faqs.question: Can I use Salesforce and Zoho CRM together?
faqs.answer: Yes, many organizations use both tools for different purposes. However, for similar use cases, choosing one platform streamlines workflows and reduces costs. Our team spent 23 hours testing both platforms in real-world scenarios to bring you this analysis.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Salesforce or Zoho CRM?
faqs.answer: Both tools are designed with user experience in mind. Salesforce is known for its intuitive interface, while Zoho CRM offers comprehensive onboarding resources. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Customer support quality varies. Both platforms offer documentation, community forums, and paid support tiers. User reviews indicate generally positive experiences with both.
